section_name: Traffic laws apply to persons riding or leading horses
text: Every person riding or leading a horse upon a roadway shall be granted all rights and shall be subject to all the duties applicable to the driver of a vehicle by this title, except as to special regulations in this article and except as to those provisions of this title which by their nature can have no application.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 7
#### Article 34
##### § 1261 — Traffic laws apply to persons riding or leading horses

Every person riding or leading a horse upon a roadway shall be granted all rights and shall be subject to all the duties applicable to the driver of a vehicle by this title, except as to special regulations in this article and except as to those provisions of this title which by their nature can have no application.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
